records.title: Transcendence - One Percent a Day [Isekai/Progression Fantasy]
records.synopsis: Reborn into a ruthless world ruled by monsters, nobles, and strength, Kyle awakens with a talent unlike anything this world has ever seen.

records.title: The Wixx Chronicles: Overgeared and Underleveled [Yuri, LITRPG, ISEKAI, Progression]
records.synopsis: *Fresh chapter daily! (Some twice a day if the mood strikes me.)*

records.title: Cyber Cultivation: When Technology meets Cultivation
records.synopsis: In 2030, Xia Li was cryogenically frozen. In 2532, he woke up to a world transformed.

records.title: Prelude: To Domathra (Isekai/LitRPG/OP MC)
records.synopsis: Pain. Violation. That was how Addy entered the world of Rengan.

records.title: What? My “Information Club” is Actually an All-Knowing Secret Society?
records.synopsis: In the burning heat of Jakarta, Arlen is a broke car wash employee with one last hope, his unpublished novel The Frozen Era. Knowing that nobody reads books anymore, he decides to sell "experience".

records.title: I Can See Health Bars [An Eldritch Apocalypse LitRPG]
records.synopsis: The story takes place in a sprawling Eastern metropolis swallowed by energy pollution...

records.title: Strifeblade Chronicles: Through Ash & Thorn
records.synopsis: When Blackthorn burns, Kaelen loses the last remnants of the life he once knew. Bound to a cursed blade born from a demon’s wrath and haunted by the ashes of his shattered tribe, he becomes the reluctant guardian of a few surviving strangers who now look to him for protection.

records.title: Old Republic: Overlord
records.synopsis: A burnt-out IT manager from future Earth dies mid-click and awakens in the Old Republic era inside the shell of a Sith medical droid, stranded on a warship balanced between victory and annihilation. In a galaxy ruled by Force dynasties, slavery, and endless cycles of war, he discovers that his mind can read systems like living code, predict outcomes, and exploit the hidden machinery beneath power itself. What begins as a desperate struggle to survive as expendable property becomes something far more dangerous: a methodical campaign to steal forbidden knowledge, master body design and essence transfer, and forge a new existence beyond the limits of both man and machine. But as he rises from hidden survivor to myth, ruler, and anomaly, the galaxy itself begins to react, because he is no longer merely defying Sith and Jedi, but pushing against the deeper cycle of reality itself.

records.title: Invoked as the Demon King Candidate
records.synopsis: When heroes are summoned from another world to stop the rise of a new Demon King, Zayn is brought over with them.

records.title: Naruto: A Genius's Story
records.synopsis: Reborn into the Hidden Leaf during the bloody Third Great Ninja War, Dongye Zhen isn't interested in the "Will of Fire" or becoming the next Hokage. To him, Chakra is a science, and survival is a calculation.

records.title: Black Knight Seeks Quiet Life [OP MC, East Meets West Fantasy]
records.synopsis: The Bloody Wight was once the most feared man in the continent. Relentless and seemingly indestructible, he waged a bloody war of conquest in the name of Emperor Novos.

records.title: Noble Blood - A Vampire Reincarnation Story
records.synopsis: What is a noble son supposed to do when he is shunned by the family, sent away to the middle of nowhere? When neither divine intervention nor folk remedy can change the circumstances of his birth?

records.title: The Willow's Daughter [Progression, Celtic Fantasy]
records.synopsis: Eighty years of living. None of it prepared her for this.

records.title: Not Meant to Survive: A LitRPG Survival Story
records.synopsis: At fifty-six, Mark isn’t fast, strong, or looking to become anyone’s hero.

records.title: Cultivator Andy [Blue Collar Cultivation LitRPG]
records.synopsis: Wake up. Mine crystals. Don't die.

records.title: Myriad Rivers to the Sea
records.synopsis: In a world where the strength of one's awakened spirit determines your starting point, the orphaned Li Yu awakens a low grade spirit: a blood-red Koi fish, deemed a Grade One, Inferior spirit fit only for a decorative pond. Mocked for his misfortune and with no future in his village.

records.title: The Wizard Left
records.synopsis: The wizard left.

records.title: Another World: Building an Empire from Zero（Kingdom Building；Military；LitRPG；Ruthless MC；Isekai）
records.synopsis: The 450th year of the Dark Age. Deep winter. Humanity is losing the war. To the brutal, green-skinned Orcs, humans are nothing more than slaves and livestock. Soren, a former Special Forces drill instructor in his past life, wakes up in the body of a lowly recruit in the Silver Moon Kingdom’s Red Moon Knights. His current situation? Abandoned at the very edge of the frontline: The Misty Swamp. It’s a death trap of toxic miasma, treacherous bogs, and magical beasts. His only assets are twenty-five demoralized, half-starved recruits. His enemy? The Orcish Alliance—a hundred-thousand-strong horde backed by shamanic magic and heavy siege engines. To make matters worse, the kingdom’s corrupt nobles are secretly colluding with the enemy, and his so-called allies are just waiting to stab him in the back. It is an absolute dead-end. A guaranteed game over. But then Soren awakens the [Warlord System]. Stripping away the naive, outdated chivalry of this era, he introduces this brutal fantasy world to something far more terrifying: modern Special Forces physical conditioning, ironclad discipline, and asymmetric warfare. No troops? He recruits rebellious peasants, wrongfully exiled criminals, gladiators on death row, and even the vassal Goblins that the Orcs use as emergency rations. Under his banner, they are forged into warriors. No gear or logistics? Night raids, poison, and ambushes become his bread and butter. He hijacks the Orcs' supply lines, builds his own foundries, and cultivates high-yield, blight-resistant crops to feed his growing army. No talent? With the System's ability to perceive hidden potentials, he unearths diamonds in the rough: a peerless sharpshooter, an ascetic monk possessing iron-body arts, a vengeful mage commander... All drawn to his cause. When the Orcish Alliance finally realizes something is wrong and dispatches an army to crush this minor nuisance... they are met with absolute horror. They aren't facing a ragged band of stragglers. They are facing a heavily fortified stronghold bristling with trebuchets and heavy repeating crossbows. Waiting for them are heavy infantry capable of crushing Orcs in melee; highly mobile Wolf Riders; a disciplined Phalanx of pikemen; longbowmen who can pierce heavy armor... and artillery-like mages unleashing elemental fury! Soren's goal is no longer just surviving the Orcish Alliance. His eyes are set on the conquest of the entire continent of Ayresia. What to Expect: Kingdom Building & Management: Building a territory from absolute zero. Absorbing multi-race refugees with a detailed focus on logistics, agricultural development, and climbing the tech tree. Army Progression: Deep tactical troop compositions (Phalanxes, Longbowmen, Repeating Crossbows, Wolf Riders, Scouts) combined with brutal, modern military training regimens. Ruthless, Pragmatic MC: A highly intelligent protagonist who calculates every move. No naive mercy or pacifism. He uses terrain, psychological warfare, and spec-ops tactics to win against overwhelming odds. Talent Scouting: Uncovering hidden gems in the rough and assembling an all-star roster of generals and specialists. Grimdark, Low-Magic Combat: Visceral, bloody cold-weapon clashes where formations, morale, and supply lines matter just as much as individual strength. System as a Tool: A System element that acts as an analytical and progression aid rather than an overpowered, hand-holding crutch.

records.title: The Cold Moon Inquisitor
records.synopsis: Tired of copy-paste Xianxia loops with infinite level-ups and happy endings? If so, this is exactly the book you need.

records.title: Transmigrated into a Novel as the Female Lead’s Ex-Husband
records.synopsis: Luke woke up in the body of a doomed side character—the heroine’s ex-husband—exactly one year before his death.

records.title: Noble, Scholar, Mage: A Practical Guide to Industrializing a Magic World
records.synopsis: One boy reinvents science and technology in a world inspired by the fall of the Roman Republic.

records.title: Our Journey's End [LitRPG] [Isekai] [Progression] [Fantasy]
records.synopsis: “I want to live too...”

records.title: Acolyte VS Adjudicator: Outbreak [Versus LitRPG, Zombie Apocalypse, Dual System]
records.synopsis: Two factions. Two Systems. One zombie apocalypse.

records.title: Liberty and Death: Does Killing the Rich for XP Count as Eating Them? [LitRPG, GL]
records.synopsis: DOES KILLING THE RICH FOR XP COUNT AS EATING THEM?

records.title: Vulture Heroes, Smoking Swordsman [Self-Destructive Cultivation/Wuxia]
records.synopsis: "The wuxia/xianxia stories on RoyalRoad that can compare to this level of quality can be counted on one hand." - Fran A mad hermit finally figured out how to cultivate smoke in the lungs into demonic Qi, took five steps out of the cave where he wrote the scripture upon the walls and instantly died. A beggar transcribed it poorly, giving everyone who practiced it 'as written' heart palpitations and stomach ulcers. He got rich though, selling it on every street corner- there was moveable block type in the Song Dynasty. An illiterate drug dealer asked his drunk friend to read it to him, but the drunk friend slurred and said "Xu Huo" instead of "Xin Huo"- the Fire of Exhaustion, not the Fire of the Heart. And because of that error, within an error, within an error... it worked. WHAT TO EXPECT: A subversive "Wuxia++", not full-on Xianxia cosmic level planet shattering, but power levels that go beyond a straight Wuxia, that builds on the lore of (in a transformative, critical and satirical way so I don't get sued) the most beloved Wuxia series ever written in the entire Chinese speaking world, that is about: A drug dealer who transforms smoke in his lungs into Demonic Qi, A drunken Shaolin Monk who actually drinks to enhance his drunken boxing among other Shaolin Arts, A virginal courtesan with a haunted flute-blade that can send out sonic wind cutting attacks, And a degenerate gambler with three Demonic Dice carved from the bones of an evil cultivator embedded in his knuckles. Four vices, four Vulture Heroes. Oh! And there's totally a LitRPG-ish Balatro style unlockables system too. NOTE: That being said, if you want to keep it that way, don't, I repeat, don't uncover the spoiler tags in the bottom author's note that re-translates the Chinese dialogue.

records.title: Bound Beneath a Broken Sky
records.synopsis: Elias Mercer should be dead.

records.title: Kurnia Chronicles: How I met My Party [Shark Yuri, Action, TRPG]
records.synopsis: Ella wished for the 'Best friend she could ever have'. She got a shark. Shortly after hopping onto a train for the very first time, Ella's life plan went up in flames. The magical school she was going to attend? Shut. Her savings? Inadequate. Her chances of surviving the night by herself? Slim to none. Fortunately this isn't a solo adventure. She has friends. Amantia, the gunslinging witch. Alba, the cybernetically enhanced were-shark. Karina, the fairy druid with her luchador tyrannosaurus companion Hercules. Ella's role? Blaster caster. Surviving the night is one thing, but even a full party might not be enough for what's coming. As coincidence follows coincidence, fate has anything but a normal life in store for Ella. Hired as security for the world's biggest arms deal, there are abyssal plots afoot that could wipe all that hard earned progress from the face of Kurnia. What you can expect: A fantasy setting that has escaped stasis with the rise of heavy industry. Statless fantasy running on D&D mechanics, spells and items behind the scenes. Strategic conflicts that extend beyond blow-by-blow action scenes. Explosions. Trains, firearms, mystery, adventure, romance! Four female leads with very different personalities. Chapters release at 4:47 GMT+8 on Tuesdays, Thursdays and Saturdays until the end of the volume circa July NEW Cover art commissioned from Jegsuuu!

records.title: How an English Town Mastered Magic in a Fantasy World

records.title: Mediocre Master: I Can See Your Hidden Potential! (A Xianxia Sect-Building LitRPG)

records.title: Star Island: A Hero’s path
records.synopsis: Star Island a place where heroes are born.

records.title: Echoes of a Broken World
records.synopsis: The world fractured the day the Nulls appeared.

records.title: The Briar-Route Waystation: I Bought a Run-Down Tavern in the Boundless Wilds
records.synopsis: Elian was done with the Guild. Ten years of thankless labor as a merchant clerk was enough. He spent every copper he had on a deed to the Oaken Hearth, a waystation situated on a "busy" road just a week from the capital of the Boundless Wilds.

records.title: Ember Blade (Apocalypse / LITRPG / Sci-fi)
records.synopsis: Check Out my New Book: I Made A Railgun With Lightning Magic :

records.title: The Lost Descendant (OP MC, LitRPG Adventure)
records.synopsis: After years of grinding to finish his novel, Evan wakes up to find himself transported into the body of a powerful mage in the world he created. Only the world is far different from what he wrote.

records.title: This Necromancer Raised Civilization Instead Of The Dead [comedy, kingdom building, litRPG & other popular tags]
records.synopsis: In a world of magic and dragons, humanity’s greatest hope is the Summoned Heroes. The Church of the Goddess, the only institution capable of performing the summoning ritual, did what any reasonable institution would do.

records.title: The Bloodmire System
records.synopsis: The World of Telia was supposed to make sense. The Gods and Goddesses of Order had imprisoned The Gods and Goddess of Chaos, The Vampiric Covens have been defeated and their Goddess sealed in the lowest reaches of the Grand Lybranth Dungeon deep under the surface of Telia by The Church Of The Sun. That doesn't mean that Telia is a peaceful place. The Mortal races are still trapped behind the massive Bastion walls that keep the Ashline Reavers at bay and the oceans are filled with untold horrors. So while Telia isn't the most peaceful place it is supposed to be a well ordered place. Which is why my whole existence shouldn't be as chaotic as it is. Seriously, how is it possible that something like me actually exists. My mom is the Goddess that the Church of the Sun prays to and my other mom is The Chained lady, The Goddess of Blood and Ash. The whole Sealing war was a minor marital spat and a massive lie. My Mother isn't chained away and while she may have abducted my mom it was probably in a more spicing up the marriage kind of way then evil monster kind of way. Regardless of that possibly scarring mental image, where does that leave me? Well it leaves me as the Chosen of both The Church Of The Sun and The Head of the Vampiric Covens and to the surprise of no one The Church wants me dead for being a Vampire and the Covens either want me dead for being a Light Spirit or to capture me to figure how I am immune to sunlight and silver. All this has left me with is years of running, two loving parents that don't totally understand boundaries and an insane ex. Maybe taking this last minute job isn't such a bad idea. If it pays well enough I might be able to disappear again for a little while.

records.title: My Only Familiar Is Me[A Late-Blooming Evolution Story]

When Earth is integrated into the Multiverse, humanity gains stats, skills, and magic—but only a select few are granted System Cores, becoming Core-bearers with a clear path to power.
